title: Lead Follow-Up Sequence
summary: Runs a timed follow-up sequence with email and call actions until a lead replies or the sequence completes.
businessOutcome: Increase contact rates on new leads without relying on manual follow-up discipline.
thumbnail: New leads enter a timed nurture and callback sequence.
problem: Fresh leads go cold when teams fail to follow up consistently after form submissions.
solution: This workflow sends staged outreach, checks for replies, notifies the team, and loops into additional follow-up when needed.
workflowOverview: Escalates with internal notification and call steps when engagement happens

access.headline: Get instant access to the Lead Follow-Up Sequence
access.subheadline: Grab the workflow, the timing logic, and the handoff structure so you can launch a cleaner follow-up system without rebuilding the sequence from scratch.
includes: Setup notes for adapting tags, owners, and notifications
access.guarantee: One-time access to the project package with implementation-ready assets and practical setup guidance.
access.supportNote: If you need custom sequences, brand voice changes, or extra CRM logic, we can adapt this into a tailored rollout for your pipeline.

upsells.title: Add the Follow-Up Optimization Pack
upsells.summary: Pair the workflow with call scripts, message-angle variants, and a lead-stage response guide so the automation performs better once it is live.
